## Summary

What changed and why.

## Roadmap Mapping

Reference relevant section(s) from `ROADMAP.md`.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Extension behavior manually verified

## Risk Review

- [ ] Event contract changes reviewed (`src/types.ts`)
- [ ] Bridge/runtime overhead checked
- [ ] UI regressions reviewed

## STATUS Commit

Primary commit message format used:

`status(###): short summary`
